stats.name: Attack
stats.description: Physical striking power. Weapon/strike ability values scale from it; baseline weapon value shape is source.atk * 2.

stats.name: Defense
stats.description: Physical bulwark. Subtracts point-for-point from incoming physical value (damage_formulas.physical) and is the main driver of max HP via the hp max_formula.

stats.name: Magic
stats.description: Magical force. Spell values scale from it (baseline tier-1 spell value shape is source.mag * 2 + 6) and it drives max MP via the mp max_formula.

stats.name: Resistance
stats.description: Magical ward. Percent-mitigates magical damage via damage_formulas.magical: value * 100 / (100 + res * 2).

stats.name: Agility
stats.description: Speed. Engine contract: sets turn order each round, higher acts first, ties random. Also the stat speed/priority selectors read, e.g. lowest(agi, side). The 'fast' monster archetype keys off this.
